rag_rules: Move guarantee and assume statements from implementation to component type scopes to comply with AGREE syntax rules
Ensure all AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and valid types from the AADL model
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes based on the nature of the statements
Generated AGREE code should preserve type consistency and avoid introducing unresolved references
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Assumptions and guarantees must be declared in component type annexes, not implementation annexes
Helper functions and constants must be defined within the same AGREE annex or imported from valid packages
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings or references in component type annexes
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers that are not present in the model's configured dependencies
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type and implementation structure extraction
